description: Daily candle closes as disrespect candle showing one-sided bullish or bearish OFLs inside. A PFVG is created on the daily timeframe. Next candle retraces into that daily FVG. Entry is taken from the FVG. No opposing daily PDA blocking the move.

required_conditions.description: Daily candle must be disrespect candle with min 60 confidence
Must have unmitigated PFVG on daily timeframe
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability and active
No unmitigated opposing PDA between entry and target

invalidation_conditions: Price closes above OFL swing high (bearish) or below OFL swing low (bullish)
FVG becomes mitigated before retrace entry
New opposing daily OFL forms before entry

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into daily PFVG zone
entry_rules.entry_price: At FVG high (bearish) or FVG low (bullish)
entry_rules.confirmation: Daily candle closes inside or bounces from FVG

sl_rules.placement: Above OFL swing high (SHORT) or below OFL swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL must cover the full OFL swing point

structural.primary: Next daily swing high (BSL) for LONG or swing low (SSL) for SHORT

notes: Video 1-5: Price always moves toward PD Array. Daily disrespect candle = one sided OFLs inside = next candle continues direction. PFVG required — RFVG auto-disqualifies.

description: Daily candle closes as respect candle with long wick at top (bearish reversal) or bottom (bullish reversal). The wick swept a swing point (BSL or SSL). A FVG is created in the reversal direction after the sweep. Entry on retrace into that FVG.

required_conditions.description: Daily candle must be respect candle — long wick confirms sweep
Swing point must be swept — not a run
FVG must exist in reversal direction after sweep

invalidation_conditions: Price closes above swept high (for bearish setup)
Price closes below swept low (for bullish setup)

entry_rules.confirmation: Candle closes inside FVG or rejects from it

sl_rules.placement: Above sweep wick high (SHORT) or below sweep wick low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL must be beyond the sweep wick — not just the FVG

notes: Video 5+8: Respect candle = OFLs both directions inside. Long wick = sweep happened. Reversal FVG = MSS confirmation. High accuracy because sweep + respect candle + FVG = triple confluence.

description: Daily IT High or IT Low has been taken creating a FVA. The FVA is IDEAL or GOOD type with overlapping FVG. Price retraces into the FVA zone. Entry from the overlapping FVG inside the FVA. This is the ODD (overlapping defense) setup — double probability.

required_conditions.description: Daily IT High or IT Low must have been taken
FVA must be IDEAL or GOOD with overlapping FVG — not WEAK
Market must be offering fair value — not seeking liquidity
Overlapping FVG must be PFVG and at opposing PDA level

invalidation_conditions: Price closes beyond FVA low (bullish) or FVA high (bearish)

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into FVA overlapping FVG zone
entry_rules.confirmation: Candle rejects from FVG inside FVA

sl_rules.placement: Below FVA low (LONG) or above FVA high (SHORT)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL beyond full FVA boundary not just FVG

notes: Video 7: IDEAL FVA = triple probability. FVA with overlapping FVG = double probability. Market offering fair value = retracement is normal and expected. Highest accuracy daily setup.

description: Daily swing high or low is swept (wick through close back). Immediately after the sweep a bearish or bullish PFVG is created. This is the turtle soup setup on the daily timeframe. Entry on retrace into the post-sweep FVG. High accuracy because sweep traps breakout traders providing fuel for the move.

required_conditions.description: Clean sweep — price went through and immediately reversed
PFVG must form immediately after sweep candle
Post-sweep OFL must be active and minimum MEDIUM probability

invalidation_conditions: Price closes above swept high (bearish) — run not sweep
Price closes below swept low (bullish) — run not sweep
More than 2 candles comfortable beyond swept level

sl_rules.placement: Above sweep wick high (SHORT) or below sweep wick low (LONG)

structural.primary: Opposing swing point (SSL for LONG, BSL for SHORT)

notes: Video 8: Turtle soup. Sweep traps breakout traders. Their stop losses fuel the continuation. Immediate reversal after sweep = clean setup. PFVG after sweep = highest accuracy version.

description: Daily BSL or SSL is swept creating a market structure shift. A FVG forms in the new direction post MSS confirming the shift. Entry on retrace into MSS FVG. This is the ICT 2022 entry model applied on the daily timeframe. MSS = price swept liquidity then created FVG in opposite direction = structure has shifted.

required_conditions.description: BSL or SSL must be swept on daily
MSS confirmed by FVG in new direction after sweep
MSS FVG must be PFVG or BFVG — not RFVG

invalidation_conditions: Price closes back above swept BSL (bullish MSS invalidated)
Price closes back below swept SSL (bearish MSS invalidated)
No FVG forms after sweep — structure not shifted

entry_rules.confirmation: Rejection from FVG in MSS direction

sl_rules.placement: Above swept BSL high (SHORT) or below swept SSL low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL must be beyond the liquidity that was swept

notes: ICT 2022 model. MSS = market structure shift. Sweep + FVG in new direction = price intention changed. Most powerful when daily sweep aligns with weekly bias.

description: Daily bias is confirmed through candle science or OFL. A daily PDA is identified as target. On the 4H timeframe an OFL forms in the daily direction with a PFVG. Entry on retrace into 4H PFVG. This is a two timeframe setup using daily for direction and 4H for entry precision.

required_conditions.description: Daily bias must be confirmed BULLISH or BEARISH
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability and active
4H OFL must align with daily direction
4H PFVG required — only highest quality FVG

invalidation_conditions: 4H OFL swing point broken (price closes beyond it)
Daily bias changes (new opposing daily OFL forms)

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) or below swing low (LONG)

notes: Two TF confluence. Daily sets direction, 4H provides entry. Direction alignment between both TFs is mandatory. Higher probability than single TF because big institution flow (daily) confirmed by 4H structure.

description: A 4H Intermediate Term High or Low is taken creating a 4H Fair Value Area. The FVA is IDEAL or GOOD with overlapping FVG. Price retraces into the FVA after taking the IT point. Entry from the overlapping FVG inside the FVA. This is the ODD setup on 4H.

required_conditions.description: Daily OFL must confirm overall direction
4H IT High or Low must have been taken
4H FVA must be IDEAL or GOOD with overlapping FVG
4H market must be offering fair value not seeking liquidity

entry_rules.trigger: Retrace into 4H FVA overlapping FVG zone
entry_rules.confirmation: 4H candle rejects from FVA FVG zone

sl_rules.placement: Beyond FVA boundary — below FVA low (LONG) above FVA high (SHORT)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL covers full FVA not just FVG

notes: Video 7: IT point break creates FVA. FVA with overlapping FVG = double probability (ODD setup). Market offering fair value = retracement expected and normal. High confidence setup.

description: 4H swing high or low is swept cleanly with immediate reversal. Post-sweep PFVG created in continuation direction. Daily direction must align. Entry from post-sweep 4H PFVG on retrace.

required_conditions.description: Daily bias confirmed before 4H sweep setup
4H sweep must be clean and align with daily direction
PFVG must form immediately after 4H sweep

invalidation_conditions: More than 2 candles comfortable beyond swept level

entry_rules.confirmation: 4H candle closes inside FVG or rejects

sl_rules.placement: Beyond sweep wick high (SHORT) or low (LONG)

notes: Video 8: 4H sweep traps 4H breakout traders. Daily direction alignment makes this high accuracy. Immediate reversal after sweep = strong signal. Post-sweep PFVG = entry confirmation.

description: 4H BSL or SSL is swept causing market structure shift. FVG forms in new direction after MSS confirming the shift. Daily direction must align. Entry into 4H MSS FVG on retrace. ICT 2022 entry model applied at 4H timeframe with daily confluence.

required_conditions.description: Daily OFL confirms overall direction
4H BSL or SSL swept
MSS confirmed by continuation FVG in new direction
MSS FVG must be PFVG for entry

invalidation_conditions: Price closes back beyond swept level invalidating MSS

sl_rules.placement: Beyond swept BSL high (SHORT) or SSL low (LONG)

notes: ICT 2022 on 4H. Daily + 4H confluence. MSS = structural confirmation of direction change. PFVG after MSS = precise entry. Strong setup when daily OFL is HIGH probability.

description: Weekly candle closed as disrespect or respect candle. 4H OFL forms in the weekly candle science direction. 4H PFVG present as entry zone. Three timeframe confluence: weekly CS + 4H OFL + 4H FVG.

required_conditions.description: Weekly candle must have clear candle science signal
4H OFL must align with weekly candle science direction
4H PFVG required for entry

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)

notes: Weekly candle science is strongest bias signal. 4H OFL + PFVG adds precision. Three timeframe confluence makes this very high accuracy but setups are less frequent.

description: 4H context area is active with FVG or FVA boundary. 1H creates OFL inside the 4H context in the 4H direction. 1H FVG is PFVG. Time must be in kill zone 2AM-10AM NY. Entry from 1H PFVG. Target is first opposing PDA within 4H context.

required_conditions.description: 4H context OFL must be HIGH probability and active
1H OFL must align with 4H direction
1H PFVG required as entry zone
Prefer kill zone 8AM-12PM NY for higher probability

sl_rules.placement: Above 1H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL covers 1H OFL swing — not just FVG

notes: Video 11: 4H context + 1H entry = strong setup. Kill zone adds volatility making FVG hold more likely. This is the most commonly used setup in active day trading with MMC.

description: 4H or Daily context is active. On 1H a sharp turn forms — FVG in (trap candle) followed by FVG out (confirmation) quickly. Faster the gap between FVG in and FVG out the better the quality. Kill zone active. Entry at FVG out.

required_conditions.description: 4H context must be HIGH probability
Sharp turn must have both FVG in and FVG out — FAST preferred
Kill zone preferred for sharp turns

invalidation_conditions: FVG out never forms after FVG in
SLOW speed quality (more than 8 candles between FVG in and out)

entry_rules.entry_price: FVG out high (SHORT) or FVG out low (LONG)
entry_rules.confirmation: FVG in and FVG out both present sequentially

sl_rules.placement: Above most recent OFL swing high (SHORT) or below OFL swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL beyond OFL swing not just FVG out

notes: Video 11: Sharp turn = manipulation trap. FVG in traps traders. FVG out confirms reversal. Faster = better. FAST sharp turns in kill zone = highest accuracy version.

description: 1H BSL or SSL is swept creating MSS on 1H. FVG forms in new direction confirming MSS. 4H direction aligns. Entry in kill zone into 1H MSS FVG. ICT 2022 model on 1H timeframe.

required_conditions.description: 4H direction must be HIGH probability
1H sweep must align with 4H direction
MSS confirmed by continuation FVG
Kill zone preferred for 1H MSS

invalidation_conditions: Price closes back beyond swept level

sl_rules.placement: Beyond swept level high (SHORT) or low (LONG)

notes: ICT 2022 on 1H. Most powerful in kill zone when 4H is HIGH probability. MSS + FVG = double confirmation of direction shift. High accuracy when all 3 TF align.

description: 1H OFL forms. Price enters the FVG but fails to reject leaving behind a swing point with no FVG. That swing point gets swept and a new FVG forms post sweep. Entry from post-sweep FVG. This is the LOD sweep setup from Video 8 on the 1H timeframe.

required_conditions.description: 4H must be HIGH probability OFL
1H OFL swing must be swept with continuation FVG
Post-sweep PFVG required for entry

invalidation_conditions: Swing point runs instead of sweeps

sl_rules.placement: Below swept swing low (LONG) above swept swing high (SHORT)

notes: Video 8: OFL sweep = price enters FVG, fails to reject, sweeps remaining swing. Post-sweep FVG = entry. Good setup when original FVG fails to hold first time.

description: 4H context active. 1H candle enters context area but first candle does not reject. Second candle sweeps PCH or PCL. FVG created after sweep. Entry from post-PCH/PCL sweep FVG. Candle science sweep from Video 8 on 1H timeframe.

required_conditions.description: 4H context must be active and HIGH probability
PCH or PCL must be swept on 1H
PFVG must form after PCH/PCL sweep

invalidation_conditions: First candle rejects (not a CS sweep setup)

sl_rules.placement: Beyond swept PCH (SHORT) or PCL (LONG)

notes: Video 8: CS sweep = first candle no rejection then PCH/PCL swept. Traps traders expecting immediate reversal. Post-sweep FVG = clean entry. Good setup in kill zone.

strategy_name: Full Stack Filtering Process Monthly to 4H
description: Full top-down analysis from Monthly to 4H entry. Monthly candle science sets macro bias. Weekly candle science confirms. Daily OFL sets direction and FVG target. 4H context area provides entry zone. Minimum 3 arguments on one side required. No mixed signals allowed. Highest probability filtering setup.

required_conditions.description: Monthly candle science must give clear directional signal
Weekly candle science must confirm monthly direction
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability aligning with weekly
4H PFVG required as entry zone

invalidation_conditions: Arguments drop below 3 on dominant side
Monthly or weekly candle science flips direction

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into 4H PFVG inside daily context

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)

notes: Video 12: Full filtering process. Monthly+Weekly CS confirms macro bias. Daily OFL gives direction. 4H gives entry. Minimum 3 arguments mandatory. Fewer setups but highest accuracy.

description: Weekly candle science sets macro bias. Daily OFL confirms. 4H context provides target. 1H PFVG provides entry precision in killzone.

required_conditions.description: Monthly candle science must give clear directional signal
Weekly candle science must confirm monthly direction
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability aligning with weekly
4H PFVG required as entry zone

invalidation_conditions: Arguments drop below 3 on dominant side
Monthly or weekly candle science flips direction

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into 4H PFVG inside daily context

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)

notes: Video 12: Full filtering process. Monthly+Weekly CS confirms macro bias. Daily OFL gives direction. 4H gives entry. Minimum 3 arguments mandatory. Fewer setups but highest accuracy.

description: Daily candle science sets macro bias. 1H OFL confirms. 15M PFVG provides entry precision.

required_conditions.description: Monthly candle science must give clear directional signal
Weekly candle science must confirm monthly direction
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability aligning with weekly
4H PFVG required as entry zone

invalidation_conditions: Arguments drop below 3 on dominant side
Monthly or weekly candle science flips direction

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into 4H PFVG inside daily context

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)

notes: Video 12: Full filtering process. Monthly+Weekly CS confirms macro bias. Daily OFL gives direction. 4H gives entry. Minimum 3 arguments mandatory. Fewer setups but highest accuracy.

description: Monthly candle science. Daily OFL. 1H structural target. 15M entry.

required_conditions.description: Monthly candle science must give clear directional signal
Weekly candle science must confirm monthly direction
Daily OFL must be HIGH probability aligning with weekly
4H PFVG required as entry zone

invalidation_conditions: Arguments drop below 3 on dominant side
Monthly or weekly candle science flips direction

entry_rules.trigger: Price retraces into 4H PFVG inside daily context

sl_rules.placement: Above 4H OFL swing high (SHORT) below swing low (LONG)

notes: Video 12: Full filtering process. Monthly+Weekly CS confirms macro bias. Daily OFL gives direction. 4H gives entry. Minimum 3 arguments mandatory. Fewer setups but highest accuracy.

strategy_name: NY Session 5M Flow Trader OFL + MSS Double Confirm
description: The primary high accuracy flow trader strategy. Daily sets direction via OFL. 4H provides FVA context area. 1H confirms with OFL. 15M shows MSS or OFL setup forming. 5M provides precise entry via PFVG. Must be in NY session 8AM-12PM ET. Both OFL and MSS present = double confirmation boom. This is the highest accuracy flow trader setup in the MMC system.

required_conditions.description: Daily OFL must be HIGH probability — sets macro direction
4H FVA must be IDEAL or GOOD confirming daily direction
1H OFL must confirm daily and 4H direction
15M MSS preferred — if absent fall back to OFL only
15M OFL must be active regardless of MSS presence
5M PFVG required as final entry zone

confirmation.double: 15M MSS + 5M PFVG = DOUBLE CONFIRM = highest priority

entry_rules.double_confirm_bonus: If both OFL and MSS present on 15M — highest probability — prioritize this over single confirm

sl_rules.placement: Above 5M OFL swing high (SHORT) or below 5M OFL swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL covers full 5M OFL swing — tight but precise

notes: PRIMARY STRATEGY. Full 5-TF stack. NY session only. Double confirmation (OFL + MSS) = boom setup. Daily HIGH probability + 4H IDEAL FVA + 1H OFL + 15M MSS + 5M PFVG = maximum confluence. Most accurate flow trader setup in MMC.

description: London session variation of the primary flow trader. High accuracy 5-TF stack during London open volatility.

required_conditions.description: Daily OFL must be HIGH probability — sets macro direction
4H FVA must be IDEAL or GOOD confirming daily direction
1H OFL must confirm daily and 4H direction
15M MSS preferred — if absent fall back to OFL only
15M OFL must be active regardless of MSS presence
5M PFVG required as final entry zone

confirmation.double: 15M MSS + 5M PFVG = DOUBLE CONFIRM = highest priority

entry_rules.double_confirm_bonus: If both OFL and MSS present on 15M — highest probability — prioritize this over single confirm

sl_rules.placement: Above 5M OFL swing high (SHORT) or below 5M OFL swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL covers full 5M OFL swing — tight but precise

notes: PRIMARY STRATEGY. Full 5-TF stack. NY session only. Double confirmation (OFL + MSS) = boom setup. Daily HIGH probability + 4H IDEAL FVA + 1H OFL + 15M MSS + 5M PFVG = maximum confluence. Most accurate flow trader setup in MMC.

1H OFL must confirm daily and 4H direction
15M MSS preferred — if absent fall back to OFL only
15M OFL must be active regardless of MSS presence

description: Universal ICT 2022 entry model applicable on any timeframe. BSL or SSL is swept. FVG forms in new direction confirming MSS. Higher TF must align. Entry on retrace into MSS FVG. Works on D1, 4H, 1H — each version tested separately.

required_conditions.description: Higher TF OFL must align with MSS direction
BSL or SSL swept on entry TF
MSS confirmed by continuation FVG
MSS FVG must be PFVG or BFVG

invalidation_conditions: Price closes back beyond swept level

entry_rules.confirmation: Rejection from MSS FVG in MSS direction

sl_rules.placement: Beyond swept BSL high (SHORT) or SSL low (LONG)

structural.secondary: ITH or ITL on entry TF

notes: ICT 2022 universal. Configurable for any TF pair. MSS = liquidity swept + FVG in new direction. Core of ICT 2022 model. Tested on D1, 4H, 1H variants separately.

description: OFL active on higher TF. Inside the OFL a MSS occurs at the FLOD or ODD level. FVG created post MSS = entry FVG. This is the highest accuracy ICT setup — OFL provides context and MSS provides the precise entry trigger inside that context. Both present = double confirmation.

required_conditions.description: Higher TF OFL must be HIGH prob with FVG as FLOD
MSS must occur at FLOD or ODD level of higher TF OFL
Post-MSS FVG must be PFVG — highest quality only

invalidation_conditions: MSS occurs beyond LOD — OFL fully invalidated
Higher TF OFL probability drops to LOW

entry_rules.trigger: Retrace into post-MSS PFVG at FLOD or ODD
entry_rules.confirmation: Both OFL context + MSS FVG present

sl_rules.placement: Above OFL swing high (SHORT) below OFL swing low (LONG)
sl_rules.hard_rule: SL at LOD of higher TF OFL

notes: Highest accuracy ICT setup. OFL provides structure context. MSS at FLOD/ODD = price respected the key level and shifted. Post-MSS PFVG = precise entry. When both present = highest priority trade.
